entries.title: Hippolytus Exegetical Fragments - Scholia on Daniel on daniel 3:7
entries.excerpt: "All the people fell." Some (did so) because they feared the king himself; but all (or "most"), because they were idolaters, obeyed the word commanded by the king.

entries.title: St. Jerome, Commentary on Daniel, CHAPTER THREE on daniel 3:7
entries.excerpt: Verse 7. "After these things the people, therefore, as soon as they heard the sound of the trumpet and pipe..." We are to take this statement in the same sense as above, so that we understand that all the peoples were represented by their leaders. For of course it was impossible for all the nations to attend at one time.
